summary.en: Developer tooling is consolidating around lightweight autonomous loops. Instead of monolithic orchestration, more runtimes now favor composable units that are easier to test and control.
summary.zh: 开发者工具正在向轻量化自治循环收敛。相比单体编排，越来越多运行时开始偏好可组合、可测试、可控的小单元。

observations.en: Heavy frameworks are losing ground to functional state-machine style runtimes.
observations.zh: 重型框架正在让位于函数式状态机风格的运行时。

observations.en: Deterministic evaluation suites are increasingly paired with generative workflows.
observations.zh: 确定性评测套件正在更紧密地与生成式流程并行。

observations.en: Latency constraints are pushing more inference and orchestration to edge environments.
observations.zh: 延迟约束正在推动更多推理与编排能力下沉到边缘环境。

quote.en: The best agent knows when to stop and ask for clarification.
quote.zh: 最好的智能体知道何时停止行动并请求澄清。
